headline: Walmart Investors Reject Proposal To Disclose AI Impact On Workers’ Safety And Well-Being: Report
summary: Walmart shareholders voted on an AI-related workforce disclosure proposal. Separately, the company added 30-minute express delivery from in-store Subway locations.

headline: Procter & Gamble Disaster Fleet Expansion And What It Means For PG Stock
summary: Procter & Gamble, NYSE:PG, is expanding a national disaster response fleet in partnership with Walmart and Matthew 25: Ministries. The collaboration is focused on delivering essential supplies and services to communities affected by disasters across the United States. The initiative reflects a deeper commitment to social impact and community support beyond Procter & Gamble's core consumer products business. For investors watching NYSE:PG, this kind of community-focused initiative adds...

headline: Walmart+ membership scheme expands to Canada
summary: The programme is priced at C$8.97 per month or C$89 annually – the same annual rate as the Delivery Pass scheme it replaces, which Walmart had offered in Canada since 2023.
